Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have a computer in my own room[n]too. It would be nice if I could use it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2067 0 0}Are you a techie? Seems like it's normal to have a computer in every household nowadays.[n]{f 1 1}
